ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "cost_of_production" REAL /* Cost incurred to produce the product */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Price at which the product is sold */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the product (1-5 scale) */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin percentage from the selling price */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity produced */,
  "sold_units" INTEGER /* Total units sold */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for sales */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Applicable discount rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_status" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse ID */,
  "date_outstanding" TEXT /* Date when the product became outstanding */,
  "remaining_initial" INTEGER /* Initial quantity remaining when marked outstanding */,
  "remaining_after_20_days" INTEGER /* Quantity remaining after 20 days */,
  "remaining_after_40_days" INTEGER /* Quantity remaining after 40 days */,
  "aging_status" TEXT /* Aging status of the inventory */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if an alert has been generated for slow-moving inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_status_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price received from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit analysis record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start of the analysis period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End of the analysis period */,
  "calculated_profit" REAL /* Calculated profit from the product based on sales */,
  "profit_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of profit calculated on the selling price */,
  "cost_variance" REAL /* Variance in production costs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_analysis_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production schedule */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine ID */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator ID */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date scheduled for production */,
  "planned_quantity" INTEGER /* Planned quantity to be produced */,
  "actual_quantity" INTEGER /* Actual quantity produced */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost of the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedule_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, production, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
